title: Section 4
content: (1) A Regional Rural Bank shall have its head office at such place in the notified area as the Central Government may, after consultation with the 1 [National Bank] and the Sponsor Bank, specify by notification in the Official Gazette. (2) A Regional Rural Bank may, if it is of opinion that it is necessary so to do, establish its branches or agencies at any place in the notified area.
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 1 of 1988, s. 4, for "Reserve Bank" (w.e.f. 28-9-1988).
